title: St Albans City and District Council: Notice of de-designation
body: "St Albans City and District Council is de-designated with effect from 6 June 2025  St Albans City and District Council was designated for speed of decision-making in respect of applications for planning permission for non-major development on 6 March 2024. The designation notice can be viewed here: St Albans City and District Council: Notice of Designation. "
